feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sales order with reference to contract, equal quantity.
entry.content:
Dear, 

I have a scenario where a contract with a quantity of 1,000 was created.

I am currently able to create a sales order with reference to the 1,100 contract, for example.

How can I lock this amount via configuration?

I need to allow order creation with reference only up to the contract quantity in this example quantity of 1,000.

Thanks.

entry.title: CDS View for 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working with SAP Datasphere loading data from S4 and I need to replace the old 2LIS* datasources with the new CDS view. Anyone knows how can I replace 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?

Thanks,

Sam

entry.title: Cancellation document pending – Cannot release via VFX3
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing an issue with a cancellation document that remains pending and has not generated the expected accounting documents.

Situation:

A billing document was canceled using VF11.
The original invoice belongs to a closed posting period (November), and the cancellation was attempted in December.
The cancellation document remains pending and did not generate the expected accounting entries.

What I tried:

I attempted to release the document using VFX3, but this requires modifying OB52 to reopen the posting period, which is not an option in this case.

Considered Option:

I am evaluating the possibility of canceling the S1 document using an S2 document.
However, I need more details regarding the copy control settings for this process, as I do not have access to SAP Note 388489.

Questions:

Is it viable to cancel S1 with S2 in this scenario?
Could someone provide details about the copy control settings for this process?
Are there alternative solutions to process the cancellation without modifying OB52?


I appreciate any suggestions or experiences you can share.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: WB2R_SC - Settlement document that reduces business volume
entry.content:
Hi All, 

in the Sales rebates scenario in S/4 Hana we configured different types of sales rebates condition contract types with different types of settlement documents (credit note, debit note etc).

The requirement of my client is that a particular type of settlement document related to a specific contract type has to reduce the business volume visible in WB2R_BUSVOL, as in the case of credit memos generated from VF01 TCODE.

Is there some settings in customizing in order to drive this behaviour in the settlement document?

Thanks for your answer

entry.title: Output type WCOCO
entry.content:
Hi all, 

the requirement of my client is that when It is saved from WCOCO a condition contract for sales rebates It should be triggered an output print with the detail of all the data entered in the CCM both at header and Item level.

In WCOCO I don't see any option for the message determination, how can I trigger a print?

Thanks for your reply!

entry.title: Issues with PDF Documents Containing Images or URLs in SAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering a persistent issue when working with PDF documents in SAP, and I would appreciate any insights or solutions you might have.

Situation: I have been using the transaction CG3Z to upload PDF documents to the SAP server. After obtaining the document's information in a binary table (type BAPICONTEN = RAW 1022), I attempt to upload this information to a document using the function module SRM_DOCUMENT_CHECKIN_VIA_TAB. The document appears to be generated correctly. However, when I try to open it using the function module SRM_DOCUMENT_DISPLAY, I encounter a read error.

Observations:

  • PDFs containing only text can be viewed correctly without any issues.
  • If the PDF contains images, the document appears blank when opened.
  • I have also tested with other documents containing images, hyperlinks, etc., and I encounter the same read error.
  • If a local document is used instead of one from the SAP server, it works correctly regardless of the elements within the document (images, hyperlinks, etc.).

entry.title: Conditions for Output - billing (NACE)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need to solve a problem related to billing prints. The client has two types of forms in the system: Form A for several countries and Form B, specific only for Poland. The problem concerns a certain type of invoice used by all sales organizations. In the billing type configuration, Form A is indicated, and in order for Poland to print its billing using Form B, I need to update the configuration in NACE. The question is whether I can limit the visibility of Form B on the billing printout list only to the Polish sales department in the configuration? 

I am attaching a screenshot below to better illustrate the example:

Is it possible to solve this issue by confguration so that the Polish sales organization can see both Form A and B, while the other sales organizations can only see Form A?

 

Thanks in advance experts!

entry.title: Sales KIT
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to create a sales order with sales kits. In this scenario, my client wants to sell product A. However, product A needs to be sold together with 3 product components. This case can be defined like that:

Example:

Product A 

@         Product A.1

         Product A.2

         Product A.3

Initially, i thought about creating sales bom. However, my client can have more than 100 different combinaisons. For this reason, we are not going with the sales bom.

Could you please propose me other solutions which i can explore? Is it possible to use delivery group in this case? If yes, how can i configure the item category by including the parameter for the delivery group?

Thanks

 @Lakshmipathi 

@jignesh_mehta3

entry.title: Usecase of Flight order creation for a customer reservation and processing it through Invoicing
entry.content:
Hi SAP OTC community Team,

I'm working on a use case where we need to handle flight reservation requests from customers to airlines and capture them using the 'Flight Order' object in SAP. Our goal is to process these orders through billing and invoicing. If anyone has experience with a similar use case, could you share the list of relevant objects involved? Additionally, are there any specific billing and invoicing settings that need to be configured in SAP for this process?

Thanks,
Reddy.

entry.title: Duplicate plan order orders for same sales order line item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Please help me on this issue.

In some cases duplicate plan orders has been created for same sales order line item. Please see below details.

Material type :- KMAT

Strategy Group :- 25

Lot Sizing Procedure :- Ex

Maximum/Minimum lot size :- "0"

Can anyone let me know the reasons behind this?

Thank you.

entry.title: Packaging material in sales order without WM in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using S4 HANA with materials managed in Storage locations (No WM / EWM).

My question is that the packaging material is decided later , depending upon the material which is going to be packed. Do we need to add packaging material already in the sales order or it can be added later in the outbound delivery?

entry.title: Sales condition scales by unit price not condition value
entry.content:
Dear all , 

In sales pricing procedure , is it possible to apply % on base price condition by scales based on unit price not total condition value ?

Example :

0€ to 100€ --> 10% 

101€ to 200€ --> 20%

Amount = 10€ , Qty = 15 , Condition value = 150€

i need to apply condition 10% as 10€ belongs to (0 to 100) , as per current behavior system fetches 20% since 150€ belongs to (101 to 200)

entry.title: Inter-company dropship process
entry.content:
Hello community

We are trying to design a process flow for the below scenario. It is a mix of Inter-company and Drop-ship.

Manufacturing Plant is in USA. Marketing Plant in UK. Customer is in Europe regions. Selling fully configurable vehicles.

Limitations: USA Manufacturing Plant will have the Variant Configuration, BOM, Routing, Costs etc. But UK Marketing Plant will not maintain any of these. They just order from USA.

Marketing plant enters the Sales Order (with UK Sales Area). The Plant on the line item will be USA. USA will manufacture and PGI the delivery, but UK Marketing Plant will need to receive it and add user manuals, alter a fender/other parts and then ship to European customer. UK Marketing plant will not stock the materials for long, they are more like receive, perform a couple of minor touch-up/changes and ship to customer.

We tried to map this flow but couldn't really succeed.

After the order is PGI'd in USA, we couldn't think of a way to ship to UK Marketing Plant without generating a billing document. Can we use 2 deliveries? or a virtual PO or some other way?

All suggestions are highly appreciated. Thanks!

SD (Sales and Distribution) SD Sales

entry.title: Invoice before goods issue in SAP S4 HANA without EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using S4HANA, and we have a scenario in which we need documentation invoice performa etc before doing actual goods issue for custom clearnance.  Is there a standard functionality like "invoice before goods issue" in EWM? please note we are not using EWM.

And how do we identify deliveries that are valid for such cases?

entry.title: Partial invoicing with item category TAD service
entry.content:
Hello,

My client wants to create a partial sales invoice (F2) from a sales order without delivery.

The item category that we are using is TAD for service.

How can i put in place this process? 

I have changed the billing relevance of the item category to K.

In the header of the copy control, I have maintained a copy requirement of "001" and item leve for copying requirement i have maintained "002" and data VBRK/VBRP "001". 

When i tried to create the invoice, the system is throwing me this message:

Error Log

XXXXX 000010 The item is not relevant for billing.

Can you please help me?

@Lakshmipathi

@Jignesh_Mehta

entry.title: Canada tax procedure
entry.content:
Hi, 

There is a requirement where company code for europe and Canada would be same. And company code belongs to UAE for tax saving purpose.

Now the issue is if company code belongs to UAE then conditions type of tax for Canada like JRC1 JRC2 ect is not getting triggered because system can't read TAXCAJ ( with Jurisdiction code) tax procedure where Tax condition type got assigned, also these conditions are maintained in FTXP with tax code and also  conditions record will get upated in FV11.

These conditions type should work for different company code , so to achieve this could you please help me to get solution?

entry.title: Down payment scenario
entry.content: I have a scenario where in Down payment done for 40% and need to calculate tax for remaining 60% value in customer Invoice, but the system calculating tax from the total order value. In DP inv tax calculated correctly MWST 15%  but in cust invoice for the remaining net value 15% tax calculation is happening on the total order value which is not correct. Experts seeking your ...advise.

entry.title: Hi there, I have the following case with Material Substitution determination and BOM ERLA structures
entry.content:
Hi there, I have the following case with Material Substitution determination and BOM ERLA structures.

My client uses Material Determination Determ.Type A001 Material Entered in transaction VB13 with Substitution reason 0006 ProdSel - Order only. This substitution works as there is a new material that comes into use with a new number, this new material can be substituted with the old material and vice versa depending on availability. The system looks if there is stock of the old one even if you have entered the new one, and if there is stock from the old number the system substitutes it in the sales order by adding a new line item with the old material number. Therefore there is one line item with the entered new material and one line item pops up with the new old material if stock still exists. This is fine form the materials with Item Category Group NORM. However, they also have BOM materials with ERLA Structure where the header material with   Item Category Group ERLA is the stock material and it has some service items as components. When the ERLA BOM Materials are entered the material substitution does not work as described above, even though they are defined i the same way in for Material Determination type A001 Material Entered in transaction VB13 with Substitution reason 0006 ProdSel - Order only. The clients expectation is that the BOM Header Material will be substituted with the old BOM Header Material based on availability. I am curious if this is just a standard limitation of using the BOM structures. Can anyone help?

S4 Hana on Premise

entry.title: Como consultar quantos itens de uma ordem de venda fechada (VA03), já foram faturados?
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal.

Eu preciso saber quantos itens de uma ordem de venda fechada, t-code VA03, já foram faturados?

Poderiam me instruir por favor se é possível listar isso facilmente, ou se é necessário extrair e cruzar algumas tabelas no SE16N?

Ao abrir a ordem na VA03, eu tenho apenas um material, e gostaria de ver uma lista de remessas/faturas que foram geradas a partir desta ordem.

 

Obrigado,

entry.title: Stock Consumption of Packaging Material
entry.content:
I have client Requirement that Packaging Material Stock should be reduce when creating delivery/PGI.

They don't want to add Packaging Material in Line item .
How to Achieve this?

Please help

@Lakshmipathi  Please help
